data.body: Phase 0-1 done. Epic e68d 'Authenticated identity' has 8 leaf children (7 stories + 1 docs task), all open, no explicit blocking edges. Foundation dep 2fd4 (attest substrate: DSSE/SSHSIG/registry) CLOSED and present in src/rebar/attest/. Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-identity on branch identity-epic @ origin/main tip 2272d68ca. Local venv built, commit-msg hook installed. Landing: Gerrit stacked relation chain to refs/for/main. Content-derived stack order: ddbe -> 4e9d -> bde5 -> e165 -> 264f -> 2f13 -> 3183 -> 4b5b(docs).
